description: Fivetran is a managed data movement platform that syncs data from many source systems into cloud data warehouses and lakes. It provides tools for managing connectors, destinations, transformations, and related account infrastructure.
summary: Fivetran exposes a REST API (including unauthenticated public connector-metadata endpoints) and a self-hosted MCP server package that uses Fivetran API credentials; OAuth endpoints for an `mcp` scope are present but no public developer-facing OAuth integration surface was documented.
